title: LLM client config and system prompt builder
evidence: DEFAULT_LLM_CONFIG uses /llm-proxy/v1 in DEV mode (Vite proxy rewrites path)
VITE_LLM_BASE_URL holds host only (no /v1 suffix) per adversarial review
buildSystemPrompt() in src/agent/buildSystemPrompt.ts — session-static, not per-message
Lists all registered components with name, category, displayName
notes: loadEnv() from vite used in vite.config.ts for config-time env access.
